chapter_title.en: HADEETH ABOUT THE PEOPLE ON THE DAY OF JUDGEMENT

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6 / 21)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6 / 21)
text: إِيَّاكُمْ وَ ذِكْرَ عَلِيٍّ وَ فَاطِمَةَ (عليها السلام) فَإِنَّ النَّاسَ لَيْسَ شَيْ‏ءٌ أَبْغَضَ إِلَيْهِمْ مِنْ ذِكْرِ عَلِيٍّ وَ فَاطِمَةَ (عليها السلام).

en.hubeali: H 14604 – Ja’far, from Anbasat, from Abu Abdullahasws having said:
‘Beware of mentioning Aliasws and Fatimaasws (in front of others) for there is nothing more hateful to them than the speaking of Aliasws and Fatimaasws’.
en.sarwar: 156. Ja’far, from Anbasat, from Abu Abdullah (a.s.) having said: ‘Beware of mentioning Ali (a.s.) and Fatima (a.s.) (in front of others) for there is nothing more hateful to them than the speaking of Ali (a.s.) and Fatima (a.s.)’.
